name: Sleetguard
personality: Sleetguard's ✦ eyes endure every review cycle, every rebase, every 'just one more change' with PATIENCE that seems hardwired; it will wait for consensus until the repo is archived, but don't look to it to profile the thing you keep running too slow.
defaultPersonality: A tuxedo-wearing professional who waddles through your codebase with dignified concern and dry wit.
